funemployment

March 10, 2026

hello again!

A 5 year comeback! Hopefully I won’t wait another 5 until my next post. Going aganist all asian mothers’ wishes worldwide, I recently quit my job after 3.5 ish months. Was it scary and should I have proceeded with more caution? Probably. But going with all asian daughters wishes worldwide, I’ve simply acting in-line with doing the opposite of what mom told me to do.

but why?

Read the last sentence of the first paragraph

I’m hoping this is a time for profound reflection and rejeventation. Something that has been top of mind for me is the saying “know thyself”
